MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT THE ROMAN CATHOLIC ARCHBISHOP OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ISSUES:
APPEAR: Michael P. Guta, Esq. 510/588-1000 for pltf & opposing party; Lawrence R. Jannuzzi, Esq. & John P. Christian, Esq. 433-1400 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION RE INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER PLAINTIFF WAS SANCTIONED BECAUSE OF HIS COMPLAINT RATHER THAN MANNER OF REPORTING. GRANT AS TO DEFAMATION. COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF TO BE A LIMITED PUBLIC FIGURE. NO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE MALICE. STANDARD IS CLEAR AND CONVINCING). Pltf to prepare order. (302/AJR/PB) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
